start: 👋 Hello {name}! • I'm a social media video downloader bot • YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, and more 📥 Send me a video link and download options will appear. Type /help to see all commands.
help: 📖 Commands list • /start — Start the bot • /help — Show this menu • /about — About this bot • /settings — Settings • /stats — Your stats • /lang — Change language • /ping — Check bot response time 📥 To download a video: just send the link in chat.
about: ℹ️ About this bot • Professional video downloader bot • Supported platforms: {sites} • Built with Python + yt-dlp + python-telegram-bot
banned: 🚫 You are banned from using this bot.
rate_limited: ⏳ Slow down! Please wait a moment and try again.
invalid_url: ❌ Invalid link Make sure the site is supported.
coming_soon: 🚧 Feature under development Will be enabled in the next project phase.
